rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.370, which governs the comptroller's authority to accept gifts and donations for program administration. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The comptroller may solicit and accept gifts, grants, and donations from any public or private source for any expenses related to the administration of the program
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns an unrelated education program provision.
